extDescription.message: AI-MarkDone for ChatGPT: reader mode, directory, bookmarks, PNG/PDF export, LaTeX copy, and Markdown copy.

copyPngCancelled.description: Message shown when Copy as PNG is cancelled

readerOutlineLabel.description: Accessible label for the Reader markdown heading outline

readerOutlineGoToHeading.description: Accessible label for jumping to a Reader markdown heading

clipboardImageWriteUnsupported.message: This browser does not support copying PNG images

exportAsFolders.message: Export as hierarchical folders and bookmarks

readerCommentTemplateHint.message: Insert tokens with the buttons above. Token labels are localized; export uses stable internal placeholders.

readerContentWidthDesc.message: Maximum Reader body width in pixels. The content still shrinks to fit the panel.

globalFontSizeDesc.message: Adjust AI-MarkDone interface text from 12px to 20px.

themeAccentColorDesc.message: Choose the accent color used by primary actions, links, focus rings, and selected states.

advancedSettingsDesc.message: Show focused controls for fine-tuning extension behavior.

readerCommentPromptListDesc.message: Manage reusable prompt headers for annotation export.

readerCommentPromptPositionBottomDesc.message: When enabled, copied annotations appear first and the selected user prompt is appended at the bottom.

readerCommentTemplateSettingsDesc.message: Configure the reusable template for copied annotations.

readerCommentPromptRestoreDefaultsMessag.message: Restoring the starter prompts will replace all of your current prompts. Do you want to continue?

readerCommentPromptContentPlaceholder.message: Write the prompt header shown above copied annotations...

readerCommentPromptDeleteMessage.message: Delete this prompt from Reader settings?

pngExportCancelled.description: Message shown when PNG export is cancelled

pngExportCurrentProgressLabel.description: Accessible label for the current PNG message progress bar

pngExportTotalProgressLabel.description: Accessible label for the total PNG export progress bar

pngExportCurrentPreparing.description: Message for current PNG preparation progress

pngExportCurrentPreparingWithFilename.description: Message for current PNG preparation progress with filename

pngExportCurrentRendering.description: Message for current PNG rendering progress

pngExportCurrentRenderingWithFilename.description: Message for current PNG rendering progress with filename

pngExportCurrentEncoding.description: Message for current PNG encoding progress

pngExportCurrentEncodingWithFilename.description: Message for current PNG encoding progress with filename

pngExportCurrentDone.description: Message for current PNG completion progress

pngExportCurrentDoneWithFilename.description: Message for current PNG completion progress with filename

pngExportWidthPresetDesc.message: Choose the default card width used for PNG exports.

pngExportWidthValueDesc.message: Preset widths stay fixed. Choose Custom to edit the PNG width in pixels.

pngExportPixelRatioDesc.message: Controls raster sharpness. Default is 1x; maximum is 3x. Long exports may still be capped for stability.

reloadMessage.message: Please reload the page to apply the new language setting.

titleTooLong.message: Title must be 100 characters or less

platformRetirementNotice.message: Starting in v4.5.0, Gemini, Claude, and DeepSeek support will be retired. ChatGPT will be the only supported platform for this extension.

chatgptDirectoryEnabledDesc.message: Show the right-side conversation directory on ChatGPT pages.

chatgptDirectoryModeDesc.message: Choose how message previews appear from the right-side directory.

chatgptDirectoryPromptLabelModeDesc.message: In expanded directory mode, show the first 15 and last 15 prompt characters.

createFirstFolder.message: Create your first folder to organize bookmarks

noResultsHint.message: Try clearing search, platform, or folder filters.

maxDepthMessage.message: Maximum folder depth of 3 levels reached.

folderNameTooLong.message: Folder name must be $1 characters or less.

folderNameControlChars.message: Folder name cannot contain control characters.

deleteBookmarkMessage.message: Are you sure you want to delete this bookmark?

noBookmarksToMoveNote.message: Note: Folders cannot be moved, only bookmarks.

wordCountDesc.message: Show word count statistics in toolbar

formulaClickCopyMarkdownDesc.message: Click a formula to copy its original LaTeX / Markdown source.

formulaAssetActionsDesc.message: Configure which PNG / SVG copy and save actions appear on formula hover.

contextOnlySaveDesc.message: Save space by keeping only 500 chars. Full preview will be specific to the context.

renderCodeBlocksDesc.message: Display syntax-highlighted code in Reader Mode

readerOutlineToggleDesc.message: Show the right-side heading outline when the current Reader page has multiple Markdown headings.

supportDevDesc.message: AI-MarkDone is open source. Star us on GitHub.

supportCoffeeDesc.message: Support the project with a coffee if you want to.

aboutProfileBio.message: I am an engineering graduate student. I do not work directly in computer science, but I enjoy tinkering with AI tools in my spare time. Feel free to follow me.

deleteBookmarkTip.message: Tip: You can export your bookmarks first to create a backup.

notEnoughStorageForImport.message: Not enough storage space for import

maxDepthSubfolderMessage.message: Cannot create subfolder: Maximum folder depth is $1 levels.\n\nPlease create a new root folder or organize within existing folders.

maxDepthFolderMessage.message:
Cannot create folder: Maximum folder depth is $1 levels.

Current path would be: $2
Depth: $3

Please create a new root folder or organize within existing folders.

settingsTabPlaceholder.message: Settings are UI-only in this rewrite stage. Bookmark data actions remain available here.

sponsorTabPlaceholder.message: If you find AI-MarkDone useful, consider supporting the project.

repairConfirm.message: Run repair? This may remove corrupted entries (quarantine is preserved).

promptTargetParentFolder.message: Target parent folder path (empty for root)

backupWarning.message: ⚠️ Uninstalling the extension will delete all bookmarks.

failedToExtractUserMessage.message: Failed to extract user message. Please try again.

failedToPrepareBookmark.message: Failed to prepare bookmark. Please try again.

contextOnlyConfirmSummary.message: This will save only 500 characters (250 from start + 250 from end) for new bookmarks.

contextOnlyTradeoffDesc.message: Full text preview will not be available in the bookmark panel.

noFoldersCreateHint.message: No folders yet. Create one to get started!

emptyBookmarksHint.message: Create a folder or import bookmarks to start browsing saved messages.

settingsShowSaveMessagesDesc.message: Show the Save Messages action where export is supported.

settingsShowWordCountDesc.message: Display word count information for saved and rendered content.

settingsEnableClickToCopyDesc.message: Copy message content directly when supported surfaces are clicked.

settingsSaveContextOnlyDesc.message: Only save the conversation context instead of the full thread when exporting or bookmarking.

settingsRenderCodeInReaderDesc.message: Render fenced code blocks with reader formatting instead of raw plain text.

settingsInterfaceLanguageDesc.message: Auto follows the browser, or pin the UI to a specific locale.

backupBookmarksHint.message: Export everything before major refactors or browser reinstalls.

sponsorOpenSourceNote.message: Star the repository to help the project stay visible.

sponsorOpenSourceBody.message: If the project is useful, starring the repository is the fastest way to help. It improves discoverability and makes continued maintenance easier to justify.

sponsorDonateNote.message: Support development directly with the existing sponsor channels.

sponsorDonateBody.message: If AI-MarkDone saves you time, you can also support development directly through the same two channels used in the shipped sponsor tab.

sponsorBmcAlt.message: Buy Me a Coffee QR code

sponsorThanksDesc.message: Every bit of support makes AI-MarkDone easier to keep improving.

importMergeRenamedTitlesDetail.message: $1 titles were renamed to avoid conflicts.
